title: Toolbar Sounds
description: A lightweight datapack that brings sound effects to your toolbar (hotbar).
body:
## Overview
Give the toolbar some subtle presence with this lightweight data pack. Plays tweaked Vanilla sound effects while scrolling through the toolbar (switching items on the hotbar), with different category sounds for:

- "Blunt" swords (wood and stone)
- Bow and crossbow
- Potions
- Shield
- Swords (the sharp ones)
- Tools (axes, hoes, pickaxes, and shovels)

Works on Singleplayer and Multiplayer worlds, and is built to be extensible to support mod items through future compatibility packs.

## Installation
Save the downloaded data pack .zip file to the `datapacks` folder of your world. If the world is live, use the command `/reload` to load it in. For more details check out the [documentation here](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Data_pack?so=search#Usage).

## Compatibility
**Now supports 1.20 to 1.21.8!** Please be sure to pick the correct file for your Minecraft version. :)

Always open to expanding that range. Feel free to get in touch via the Github [issues page](https://github.com/villainous-j/toolbar-sounds/issues) if you have any requests!

## Uninstallation
The following command will clear any schedules or scoreboards from the data pack:

```
/function toolbar_sounds:uninstall
```
